property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stop the effects of a Combat card. Use when needed. If you declared a tokui-waza, your opponent shuffles their hand into their life deck and draws the same number of cards minus 1. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. You may discard the top 4 cards of your life deck to discard up to 2 Non-Combat or allies in play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused Physical attack doing 3 life cards of damage. If successful, discard 2 cards from your opponent's hand. If stopped, discard a card from your hand.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Stops a physical or energy attack. If you declared a tokui-waza, remove the bottom 5 cards of your opponent's discard pile from the game and your Main Personality gains 5 power stages. Remove from game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. If you declared a tokui-waza, your opponent plays with their hand revealed. When you use an effect to discard cards from your opponent's hand during combat, they are removed from the game instead of discarded.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops the effects of any combat card. Use when needed. If you declared a tokui-waza, lower your opponent's anger 2 levels and search your discard pile for a Non-Combat card and place it into play. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Focused Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If you have lowered your opponent's anger this combat, gain 3 power stages and discard an opponent's Non-Combat card in play. Remove from game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Energy attack doing 3 life cards of damage. If successful and you declared a tokui-waza, raise or lower your opponent's Main Personality 1 level. Remove from game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Focused physical attack doing +3 power satges of damage. If successful, shuffle a dragonball in play back into its owner's life deck. If your opponent's anger is at 0 or 1, this card can stop a physical attack instead. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Your Blue style attacks gain "If successful, lower your opponent's anger 1." Prevent X life cards of damage from your opponent's attacks, where X=4 minus your opponent's anger. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops the effects of any combat card. Use when needed. If you declared a tokui-waza, shuffle up to 5 cards in your discard pile back into your life deck, then look at and rearrange the top 6 cards of your life deck in any order. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 3. Transform. Energy attack doing 3 life cards of damage. Discard up to 1 Non-Combat card in play. If your Main Personalities highest power rating is below 500,000, this attack deals 6 life cards of damage and discards up to 2 Non-Combat cards in play instead. Remove from game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Endurance 3. Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Empower 4. Choose up to 2 cards in your discard pile and shuffle them back into your life deck. If you have shuffled cards back into your life deck earlier this combat, you may place 1 of the chosen cards into your hand. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage Only. If there are only Namekian stlye cards in your discard pile, then for the remainder of combat, your Namekian style attacks deal +2 life cards of damage, and your energy attacks cost 1 less stage to perform, to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: Resist. Once per combat, after taking damage from an attack, shuffle the top 2 cards of your discard pile into your life deck and gain 3 power stages. You do not have to remove your Namekian style cards from the game when you use their endurance.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops the effects of any combat card. Use when needed. If you declared a tokui-waza, raise your main personality to its highest power stage and search your life deck for an Orange style drill and place it into play. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Focused energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Discard an opponent's ally in play. If successful, search your life deck for a drill and set it aside. Place the chosen drill into play at the end of combat. Remove from game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Focused energy attack doing X life cards of damage, where X equals 2 times the number of allies you have in play. If the Ginyu Force is your main personality, this attack costs 0 stages to perform. If successful, search your deck or discard pile for an ally and place it into play at 3 power stages above 0. Remove from game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Drill

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this drill is in your discard pile when your MP advances or loses a personality level, you may place it into play.) Once per combat, after making a successful attack, place the bottom card of your discard pile under this drill. At the beginning of your turn, you may remove this card from the game to add the cards under it to your hand. You can have a maximum of 3 cards under this drill.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops the effects of any combat card. Use when needed. If you declared a tokui-waza, raise your anger 2 levels or draw a card. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Physical attack doing +3 power satges of damage. Raise your anger 1. For the remainder of combat you cannot gain anger and during your Attacker Attack phase, you may lower your anger 2 to perform a physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: For the remainder of combat, your opponent's attacks deal +2 life cards of damage and gain "If successful, raise your opponent's anger 1." You may only play 1 Red Frustration per turn.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused energy attack. Raise your anger 1 level. Shuffle the top 2 Red style cards in your discard pile into your life deck. If your anger is 3 or higher, you may place an energy combat from among those cards into your hand. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops the effects of any combat card. Use when needed. If you declared a tokui-waza, your Saiyan style attacks deal +2 power stages of damage for the remainder of combat and your opponent's personalities lose 2 power stages. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Physical Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage. If successful, draw a card. If you have at least one ally in play, this card performs another physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage immediately after the first one using one of your allies' power rating instead. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Energy Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Transform. Saiyan Heritage Only. Energy attack doing 3 life cards of damage. If you have at least one ally in play, this attack stays in play to be used one more time this combat. If this attack is performed by an ally, it does an additional +4 life cards of damage. Remove from game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Use immediately after taking damage from an attack. You may place an ally from your hand or discard pile into play at 4 power stages above 0. Choose an ally you control, that ally can gain control of combat this turn regardless of your MP's power stage. Draw a card. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Piccolo and Kami Only. You cannot win by MPPV. You may remove a Namekian heritage ally you control and the bottom 5 cards of your discard pile from the game. If you do, then advance your main personality to "Piccolo, Fused". Remove from game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: You cannot win by MPPV for the remainder of the game. Discard the top 5 cards of your life deck. You may advance your main personality to any level with "Super Saiyan God" in the title. Remove from game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your life deck or discard pile for a Saiyan Heritage personality (other than Cell or Cell Jr.) and put it into play at 3 stages above 0. Then, if King Vegeta is your main personality, raise all of your Saiyan Heritage allies (other than Cell or Cell Jr.) to their highest power stage. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Non-Combat: Setup

property.name: Text
property.value: Remove a Saiyan Heritage personality you control (except Cell or Cell Jr.) from play and replace it with a "Great Ape, Oozaru" from your Sensei Deck at its highest power stage. Attach this card to it. Discard this card when the personality it is attached to has its power level reduced to 0. When this card is discarded, return "Great Ape, Oozaru" to your Sensei Deck and replace the original personality at 5 stages above 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Attach a "Great Ape, Oozaru" you control to your opponent's main personality. While attached, it's text box is considered to say "When entering combat, discard one of your non-combat cards, battlegrounds or locations. If you cannot, discard the top 2 cards of your life deck. Discard this card when your MP's power level reaches 0."

property.name: Type
property.value: Event Combat

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your discard pile for up to one Saiyan Heritage personality (except Cell or Cell Jr.) and add it to your Sensei Deck. If you did not, you may place a "Power Ball" from your discard pile into play. Remove from game after use.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Whenever your opponent uses a card effect to discard any of your allies, they must discard this ally first. Saiyan Invaders does not need to be in control of combat to use this power.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (This card may only be played from your Sensei Deck.) Energy attack doing 8 life cards of damage and costs 3 power stages to perform. If King Vegeta is your main personality, this power may be used a second time this combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. If successful, discard up to 1 ally or non-combat card in play.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: (Before the first turn begins you may search your life deck for "Kami's Floating Island" and place it into play. If this card is in your MP stack, and "Kami's Floating Island" would be removed from the game, discard it instead.) Constant Combat Power: While "Kami's Floting Island" is in play, your opponent must deal an additional X cards to capture a dragon ball where X is your current anger level. Any time a dragon ball is played or captured, raise your anger 1.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: You may shuffle a Dragon Ball in play into its owner's life deck. If you do, raise your anger 2, and for the remainder of combat you cannot play copies of the Dragon Ball, and either your attacks do +2 life cards of damage, or prevent 2 life cards of damage from your opponent's attacks.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: If "Kami's Floating Island" is in play, you may use the effect of a Dragon Ball in play. If you do, shuffle it into its owner's life deck and you may not play copies of that Dragon Ball for the remainder of combat. If "Kami's Floating Island" is not in play, search your life deck or discard pile for a copy and place it into play instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All of your attacks deal +X life cards of damage, where X = the number of Dragon Balls in play. If "Kami's Floating Island" is in play, its power only affects you when entering combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Hero

property.name: Text
property.value: (You may only advance to this level via "God Ki Ritual". If your power rating is 0 at the end of combat, lower your MP to level 1. You may not redirect damage to allies.) Power: Focused energy attack or prevent all damage from a physical or energy attack. Draw a card.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: (You may only advance to this level via "God Ki Ritual". If your power rating is 0 at the end of combat, lower your MP to level 1. You may not redirect damage to allies.) Constant Combat Power: Styled attacks you perform are considered "Vegeta" named cards. Your attacks deal +2 life cards of damage for each "Vegeta" named attack you perform this combat.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Rogue

property.name: Text
property.value: (You may only advance to this level via "Forbidden Fusion". This cards name is also considered to be "Kami, Fused"). Constant Combat Power: Your opponent plays with their hand revealed. The first time you take damage each combat, raise your MP to its highest power stage or shuffle the top 4 cards of your discard pile into your life deck.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (Before the first turn of the game you may search your life deck for a copy of "Power Ball" and place it into play.) Constant Combat Power: Whenever you play a "Great Ape, Oozaru" or a Saiyan Heritage ally, raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: If King Vegeta is your main personality, your Saiyan Heritage allies (except Cell or Cell Jr.) can take control of combat even if this personality is 2 power stages above 0 or higher. If one of your Saiyan Heritage allies (except for Cell or Cell Jr.) would be removed from the game, they are discarded instead.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: Focused physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. If successful, choose up to 1 of your Saiyan Heritage allies (except Cell) in your discard pile and place it into plat at 5 stages above 0. For the remainder of combat, your allies can take control of combat even if this personality is 2 stages or more above 0.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this card is in your MP stack, you cannot win by MPPV. If you advance a personality level via this power, set your anger to 0.) Physical attack doing 5 life cards of damage or stops an attack. If there are no allies in play at the end of combat after you've used this power, and Frieza is your MP, advance your MP 1 personality level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this card is in your MP stack, you cannot win by MPPV.) Constant Combat Power: Allies cannot use their personality powers. Your attacks deal +3 life cards of damage and gain "If successful, raise your anger 2 levels and discard an ally in play."

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (If this card is in your MP stack, you cannot win by MPPV. If you advance a personality level via this power, set your anger to 0.) Constant Combat Power: Defense Shield: Stops the first unstopped attack performed against you in combat. Your opponent's Focused attacks deal a maximum of 1 power stage and 1 life card of damage. At the end of combat if this personality is at its highest power stage, advance a personality level.

property.name: Type
property.value: Personality - Villain

property.name: Text
property.value: (At the beginning of your Attacker Attacks phase if your MP is 3 or less power stages above 0, lower your MP 2 personality levels and set your anger to 0.) Constant Combat Power: When entering combat, draw a card. Damage from your attacks cannot be prevented.
